# Documentation Templates

Use these templates when creating new project documentation.

## Templates

- `adr-template.md`: architecture decision record.
- `plan-template.md`: multi-step implementation or documentation plan.
- `module-template.md`: module boundary and ownership note.
- `feature-handoff-template.md`: handoff note for a feature or Jira task.

Copy a template into the correct documentation directory and replace every placeholder before implementation starts.
